calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Garner Operations, Inc. & Steven B Garner as a individual

Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Bank of the West present in court. Excuse of witness filed on Aug 13, 2019. No appearance by defendants Garner Operations, Inc. & Steven B Garner as a individual Petitioner sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the defaulted defendant Garner Operations, Inc. & Steven B. Garner as a individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,4278.36
Prejudgment Interest - $4,400.
Costs - $985.22
Total - $17,9663.58

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
